title: thelypodium integrifolium subsp. integrifolium
intro: Thelypodium integrifolium subsp. integrifolium, commonly known as Integrifolia or Smooth Thelypodium, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a member of the Brassicaceae family, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots and leaves, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as wound healing, digestive relief, and antimicrobial protection. The roots and leaves of Thelypodium integrifolium subsp. integrifolium can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
